title: Humanity's Forgotten History with Graham Hancock #history #egypt
summary: Graham Hancock discusses his theory of a lost civilization, citing shared symbols, ideas, and beliefs about death found across ancient cultures worldwide. He emphasizes the need for archaeological investigation of the Sahara Desert, which was green and fertile during the Ice Age.

key_claims.claim: There is a forgotten episode in human history that manifests through shared ideas and influences found around the world
The Sahara Desert is approximately 9 million square kilometers and has been hardly touched by archaeology
The Sahara was green and fertile during the Ice Age and could have been a place for civilization to evolve
